description: Routine should produce a market brief with TAM/SAM/SOM, trends with evidence, buyer behavior, and explicit portfolio implications — not generic trade-press summary.

input_ticket.title: Market analysis: AI-powered recipe apps
input_ticket.description: Recipe Remix is an AI-powered recipe prototype. Size and shape the market: TAM/SAM, trends, buyer segments, what's driving adoption, what's blocking it.

smoke_questions: Is TAM given a specific number (or explicit 'can't source, here's why'), not a vague 'large'?
Does each trend have at least one citation?
Does buyer-behavior section describe WHO buys and WHAT triggers purchase?
Do implications name specific apps (e.g., Recipe Remix), not just 'our portfolio'?
Does the brief distinguish sustaining trends from potential disruptions?
success_criteria: TAM/SAM/SOM attempted + trends with citations + specific implications + confidence label
